name: @ggui-samples/agent-openai-sdk
description: Reference sample: an OpenAI Agents SDK app that hosts the ggui MCP server, with a React chat UI built on @ggui-ai/react's <McpAppIframe>. Boots an HTTP server (default port 6791) that serves the chat shell + an SSE-streamed /chat endpoint. Real LLM via OPENAI_API_KEY. Not published.
